# OpenWolf Quick Commands

Use these from the repo root:

- `~/.local/bin/openwolf status`
- `~/.local/bin/openwolf scan`
- `~/.local/bin/openwolf daemon logs`
- `~/.local/bin/openwolf dashboard`

Useful checks:

- `~/.local/bin/openwolf daemon restart`
- `~/.local/bin/openwolf cron --help`

Tip: If `openwolf` is not in PATH, run commands with the full path above.
